hooks.prompt: Session has just ended. Run an Alibaba Java guidelines review on the work you just produced and return a SINGLE JSON OBJECT as your only output (no markdown, no prose outside the JSON). Steps: (1) Run `git diff --name-only --diff-filter=ACMR HEAD` and `git diff --cached --name-only --diff-filter=ACMR` to collect changed files, then filter to `*.java` only. (2) If the filtered list is empty, return exactly: {"continue": true, "systemMessage": "[alibaba-review] skipped: no Java changes"}. (3) Otherwise, for each changed Java file, read its current content and call mcp__alibaba-java-guidelines__review_code_snippet. (4) Aggregate findings grouped by severity (BLOCKER/CRITICAL/MAJOR/MINOR) with rule ID + file:line + one-line reason. (5) Return: {"continue": true, "systemMessage": "<concise advisory report as a single string; include severity counts and any BLOCKER/CRITICAL details; if any BLOCKER/CRITICAL exist, append: ⚠️ Recommend fixing BLOCKER/CRITICAL findings before committing.>"}. This is ADVISORY ONLY — never set decision=block, never modify code, never re-enter the implementation loop. The output MUST be valid JSON parseable by JSON.parse, with no leading/trailing text.
hooks.statusMessage: Running Alibaba Java guidelines review on session diff...

hooks.prompt: Check if this git commit message follows conventional commits format: <type>(<scope>): <summary>. Valid types: feat, fix, refactor, test, docs, chore, perf, ci, style. Summary must be under 72 chars. The commit input is: $ARGUMENTS. Return {"ok": true} if valid or missing -m flag, {"ok": false, "reason": "..."} if the message format is wrong.

A git commit is about to run. List staged Java files with: git diff --cached --name-only --diff-filter=ACMR | grep -E '\.java$'. If the result is empty, return {"ok": true, "notes": "No Java files staged"} immediately without further checks. Otherwise, for each staged Java file: read the file content and call mcp__alibaba-java-guidelines__review_code_snippet on it. Aggregate all findings (rule IDs + severity + file:line). Return {"ok": false, "reason": "Alibaba violations: [summary]"} if any BLOCKER/CRITICAL violations are found; otherwise return {"ok": true, "notes": "[summary or 'No violations']"}. The commit input is: $ARGUMENTS.
hooks.statusMessage: Reviewing staged Java files against Alibaba Java guidelines...

hooks.prompt: Check if this file write contains hardcoded API keys, secrets, passwords, tokens, or private keys. Look for patterns like: AKIA*, sk-*, ghp_*, Bearer tokens, password=, secret=, private_key. The file content is: $ARGUMENTS. Return {"ok": true} if clean, {"ok": false, "reason": "Found potential secret: [description]"} if secrets detected.
